disabled_touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint identifiers that are globally disabled. If the requested touchpoint appears in this list, the offer screen cannot open and the state is set to CAN_NOT_OPEN.

disabled_subtouchpoints.description: List of sub-touchpoint identifiers that are globally disabled. If the requested sub-touchpoint appears in this list, the offer screen cannot open and the state is set to CAN_NOT_OPEN.

touchpoints.description: List of touchpoint detail objects, each defining offer configurations for a specific touchpoint. Looked up by matching the requested touchpoint against name or names. If no match is found, the entry with name "default" is used as a fallback.

names.description: Alternative touchpoint name identifiers. A touchpoint matches if the requested touchpoint string equals the name field OR is contained in this names list.

name.description: Primary identifier for this touchpoint. Matched against the requested touchpoint string. A special value "default" serves as the fallback touchpoint when no other touchpoint matches.

info.description: List of offer parameter configurations for this touchpoint. Each entry defines an offer screen configuration with its screens, session tracking, launch logic rules, and display options. Entries are evaluated in order; the first one whose launch logic passes is selected.

thank_you_popup.description: Identifier for the thank-you popup to display after a successful subscription purchase through this offer. Mapped directly to the OfferScreenParam thankYouPopup field.

launch_logic.description: List of launch logic rule objects. Each rule defines a set of conditions (ranges, limits, filters) that must all pass for the offer to be shown. Rules are evaluated in order; the first rule where all conditions pass determines the offer is eligible.

should_replace_with_ad.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with an interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be shown for the mapped touchpoint. Defaults to false.

should_replace_with_reward_credit.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad for credits. The offer is only shown if a rewarded credit ad is available for the given touchpoint. Defaults to false.

install_day_min.description: Minimum number of days since app installation (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Checked against the passed install days counter.

editor_done_min.description: Minimum editor-done count (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Checked against the editor done counter via isInRange.

app_session_end.description: Maximum app session count (exclusive) allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the global app session counter via isInRange.

editor_done_max.description: Maximum editor-done count (exclusive) allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the editor done counter via isInRange.

session_limit_start.description: Minimum offer session count (inclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Checked against the per-touchpoint session counter.

had_subscription_package.description: List of subscription package identifiers. When non-empty, the offer only shows if the user's purchase history contains at least one of these packages.

user_had_subscription.description: Filter based on whether the user has ever had a subscription. When null, no filtering is applied. When true, the offer only shows to users who previously had a subscription. When false, only to users who never had one.

should_replace_with_reward_interstitial.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded interstitial ad. The offer is only shown if an interstitial ad can be shown for the mapped touchpoint with the rewarded interstitial flag. Defaults to false.

key_session_start.description: Minimum key-session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty; checked against the per-session-key counter.

install_day_max.description: Maximum number of days since app installation (exclusive) allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the passed install days counter.

is_ai_credit.description: Filter based on whether the current flow is an AI credit flow. When null, no filtering is applied. When set, the offer only shows if the current credit flow status matches this value.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen from within this launch logic rule. Takes priority over the legacy offer_screen_touch_point field when both are present.

repeat_key_session.description: Key-session count modulo interval for repeating the offer. A value of -1 means no repeat constraint. When set and session_key is non-empty, the offer only shows when ((keySessionCount + 1) % (repeatKeySession + 1) == 0).

storage_min_percent.description: Minimum storage usage percentage (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Checked against the cached storage usage percent.

is_store_available.description: Whether the Google Play Store must be among the active payment types for this offer to show. Compared against the presence of PaymentServiceType.Google in the user's active payment types. Defaults to true.

key_session_end.description: Maximum key-session count (exclusive) allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Only evaluated when session_key is non-empty; checked against the per-session-key counter.

repeat_session.description: App session count modulo interval for repeating the offer. A value of -1 means no repeat constraint. When set, the offer only shows when (appSessionCount % repeatSession == 0).

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen from within this launch logic rule. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used as fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is null.

restricted_packages.description: List of package/offer pairs that restrict this offer. When non-empty, all entries must pass the isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer check for the offer to be shown. When empty or null, no restriction is applied.

package_id.description: The subscription package identifier used to check user eligibility for a promotional offer via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer.

offer_id.description: The promotional offer identifier used together with package_id to check user eligibility via isUserEligibleForPromotionalOffer.

current_tier_types.description: List of subscription tier type strings the user must currently have for this offer to show. When empty, no tier filtering is applied. The special value "free" matches non-subscribed users. For subscribed users, the user's current planeMeta.tierType.value is checked against this list.

app_session_start.description: Minimum app session count (inclusive) required to show this offer. A value of -1 means no lower bound. Checked against the global app session counter via isInRange.

daily_session_limit.description: Maximum number of times this offer can be shown per day for this touchpoint+screens combination. A value of -1 means unlimited. The offer is blocked when the daily counter reaches this value.

should_replace_with_reward.description: When true, the offer screen is replaced with a rewarded ad. The offer is only shown if a rewarded ad is available for the given touchpoint. Defaults to false.

skip_offer_during_cooldown.description: When true, the offer is skipped if the one-day-pass cooldown period has not yet passed. When null or false, the cooldown check is not applied.

session_limit_end.description: Maximum offer session count (exclusive) for this touchpoint+screens combination allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the per-touchpoint session counter.

storage_max_percent.description: Maximum storage usage percentage (exclusive) allowed to show this offer. A value of -1 means no upper bound. Checked against the cached storage usage percent.

offer_variant.description: Identifier for the offer screen variant to use when displaying this offer. Mapped directly to the OfferScreenParam offerVariant field. Defaults to empty string.

screens.description: List of screen identifiers associated with this offer configuration. Used to build a composite key (touchPoint + screens joined by '.') for tracking session counts and daily limits.

offer_screen_touchpoint.description: Touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics or screen configuration. Takes priority over the legacy offer_screen_touch_point field when both are present.

session_key.description: A key used to track key-session counts independently from the touchpoint. When non-empty, the key-session count is incremented on each offer display and checked against key_session_start/key_session_end range and repeat_key_session modulo logic.

is_one_time_offer.description: When true, marks this offer as a one-time purchase offer. Mapped to OneTimePurchaseDetails.isOfferOneTime in the entity layer. Defaults to false.

offer_screen_touch_point.description: Legacy touchpoint identifier passed to the offer screen for analytics or screen configuration. Superseded by offer_screen_touchpoint; used as fallback when offer_screen_touchpoint is null.
